<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="es">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8"/>
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1.0"/>
<title>Academia De Cero a Top Producer — Diana Ariza</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:wght@400;700;900&family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
*{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
body{font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;background:#FAF7F0;color:#1A1A2E}
.hidden{display:none!important}

/* ── LANDING ── */
#landing{min-height:100vh;background:linear-gradient(160deg,#0A1628 0%,#132F6B 50%,#1A4A9A 100%);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:40px 20px}
.landing-box{position:relative;z-index:1}
.landing-box{max-width:480px;width:100%;text-align:center}
.gold-line{width:60px;height:3px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,#D4A843,transparent);margin:0 auto 28px}
.logo-img{width:100px;height:100px;object-fit:contain;margin-bottom:16px}
.acad-label{color:#D4A843;font-size:10px;letter-spacing:7px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:10px}
.acad-title{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:clamp(28px,6vw,52px);color:#fff;line-height:1.1;font-weight:900}
.acad-title.gold{color:#D4A843;margin-bottom:14px}
.acad-sub{color:#FDF0C0;font-size:14px;margin-bottom:8px;opacity:.85}
.divider{width:100%;height:1px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,#D4A843,transparent);margin-bottom:28px}
.features-box{background:rgba(255,255,255,.06);border-radius:16px;padding:20px 22px;margin-bottom:24px;border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.25)}
.features-label{color:#D4A843;font-size:10px;letter-spacing:3px;margin-bottom:14px;font-weight:700}
.feature-item{display:flex;gap:10px;margin-bottom:9px;align-items:flex-start;text-align:left}
.feature-dot{width:5px;height:5px;border-radius:50%;background:#D4A843;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:5px}
.feature-text{color:#FDF0C0;font-size:13px;line-height:1.5;opacity:.9}
.btn{border-radius:10px;padding:12px 24px;font-size:14px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;border:none;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;transition:all .18s;display:inline-block;width:100%}
.btn-gold{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#A07820,#D4A843);color:#0A1628;margin-bottom:10px;padding:16px}
.btn-ghost{background:transparent;color:#F0CC5A;border:1.5px solid rgba(201,168,76,.4);padding:13px}
.btn:hover{opacity:.88;transform:translateY(-1px)}
.code-box{background:rgba(255,255,255,.07);border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.35);border-radius:14px;padding:18px;margin-top:10px}
.code-input{width:100%;background:rgba(255,255,255,.1);border:1.5px solid rgba(201,168,76,.4);border-radius:9px;padding:11px 13px;color:#fff;font-size:14px;outline:none;box-sizing:border-box;margin-bottom:8px;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif}
.code-input.error{border-color:#E74C3C}
.err-msg{color:#E74C3C;font-size:12px;margin-bottom:8px}
.tagline{color:#F0CC5A;font-size:11px;margin-top:16px;letter-spacing:3px;opacity:.75;text-transform:uppercase}

/* ── LEAD FORM ── */
#leadform{min-height:100vh;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:40px 20px;background:#FAF7F0}
.form-box{max-width:500px;width:100%}
.badge{background:#FDF0C0;color:#0A1628;border:1px solid #D4A84344;border-radius:99px;padding:3px 12px;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1px}
.form-title{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;color:#0A1628;font-size:26px;margin:12px 0 4px}
.form-sub{color:#7A8FA6;font-size:13px;margin-bottom:20px}
.card{background:#fff;border-radius:18px;border:1px solid #F0EBE0;box-shadow:0 2px 16px rgba(0,0,0,.06);padding:26px 22px}
.field-label{color:#4A5568;font-size:11px;letter-spacing:1.5px;display:block;margin-bottom:5px;font-weight:600}
.field-input{width:100%;background:#FAF7F0;border:1.5px solid #F0EBE0;border-radius:9px;padding:11px 13px;color:#1A1A2E;font-size:14px;outline:none;box-sizing:border-box;margin-bottom:14px;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif}
.grid-2{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:8px;margin-bottom:14px}
.opt-btn{background:#FAF7F0;border:1.5px solid #F0EBE0;border-radius:9px;padding:10px;color:#4A5568;font-size:13px;cursor:pointer;font-weight:400;transition:all .15s;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif}
.opt-btn.active{background:#0A1628;border-color:#0A1628;color:#fff;font-weight:700}
.btn-navy{background:#0A1628;color:#fff;padding:15px;margin-top:14px;font-size:15px}

/* ── NO LICENSE ── */
#nolicense{min-height:100vh;background:#FAF7F0;padding:30px 16px}
.nl-wrap{max-width:620px;margin:0 auto}
.nl-header{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0A1628,#0F2547);border-radius:18px 18px 0 0;padding:28px 24px 20px;text-align:center;border-bottom:3px solid #D4A843}
.nl-title{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;color:#D4A843;font-size:26px;letter-spacing:3px;margin-bottom:4px}
.nl-subtitle{color:#F0CC5A;font-size:13px;font-style:italic;letter-spacing:2px;opacity:.9}
.nl-body{background:#fff;padding:20px 24px 16px;text-align:center;border-bottom:1px solid #F0EBE0}
.option-bar{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0A1628,#0F2547);padding:10px 18px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px}
.opt-tag{background:#D4A843;color:#0A1628;font-size:10px;font-weight:800;padding:3px 10px;border-radius:99px;letter-spacing:1px}
.opt-name{color:#F0CC5A;font-size:12px;font-weight:600}
.option-body{padding:18px 22px;background:#fff;border-left:3px solid #D4A843;border-right:3px solid #D4A843}
.benefit{display:flex;gap:10px;margin-bottom:9px;align-items:flex-start}
.benefit-dot{width:8px;height:8px;background:#D4A843;border-radius:2px;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:5px}
.code-display{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0A1628,#0F2547);border-radius:10px;padding:12px 16px;text-align:center;margin:14px 0;border:1px solid #D4A843}
.code-value{color:#D4A843;font-size:20px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:3px}
.btn-link{display:block;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#A07820,#D4A843);border-radius:99px;padding:13px;text-align:center;color:#0A1628;font-weight:700;font-size:14px;text-decoration:none;cursor:pointer;border:none;width:100%;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif}
.nl-footer{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0A1628,#0F2547);border-radius:0 0 18px 18px;padding:18px 24px;text-align:center;border-top:3px solid #D4A843;margin-bottom:24px}
.divider-gray{height:12px;background:#F0EBE0}
.back-center{text-align:center;padding-bottom:20px}
.btn-outline{background:transparent;color:#0A1628;border:1.5px solid #2A5FAD;border-radius:10px;padding:11px 28px;font-size:13px;cursor:pointer;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif}

/* ── SURVEY ── */
#survey{min-height:100vh;background:#FAF7F0;padding:40px 20px}
.survey-box{max-width:620px;margin:0 auto}
.progress-bar{background:#F0EBE0;border-radius:99px;height:7px;overflow:hidden;margin-bottom:24px}
.progress-fill{height:100%;background:linear-gradient(90deg,#A07820,#F0CC5A);transition:width .5s ease}
.section-label{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;margin:22px 0 14px}
.section-dot{height:2px;width:22px;background:#D4A843}
.section-text{color:#D4A843;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:4px}
.section-line{height:2px;flex:1;background:linear-gradient(90deg,#D4A843,transparent)}
.q-text{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;color:#0A1628;font-size:18px;margin-bottom:20px;line-height:1.5}
.survey-box{transition:opacity .35s ease}
.survey-fade-out{opacity:0;transform:translateX(-12px);transition:opacity .3s ease, transform .3s ease}
.survey-fade-in{opacity:0;transform:translateX(12px)}
.survey-active{opacity:1;transform:translateX(0);transition:opacity .35s ease, transform .35s ease}
.answer-btn{width:100%;background:#fff;border:1.5px solid #F0EBE0;border-radius:12px;padding:14px 16px;text-align:left;cursor:pointer;margin-bottom:10px;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;transition:all .15s;color:#1A1A2E;font-size:14px}
.answer-btn:hover,.answer-btn.selected{background:#0A1628;border-color:#0A1628;color:#fff}
.answer-letter{font-weight:700;margin-right:8px;color:#D4A843}
.answer-btn.selected .answer-letter{color:#D4A843}
.answer-btn:hover .answer-letter{color:#D4A843}
.next-btn{margin-top:10px;padding:14px;font-size:15px}

/* ── RESULT ── */
#result{min-height:100vh;background:#FAF7F0;padding:40px 20px}
.result-box{max-width:620px;margin:0 auto}

/* ── VIDEO ── */
#videow{min-height:100vh;background:#FAF7F0;padding:30px 16px}
.video-wrap{max-width:660px;margin:0 auto}
.video-frame{position:relative;padding-bottom:56.25%;border-radius:18px;overflow:hidden;margin-bottom:20px}
.video-frame-wrap{position:relative;border-radius:18px;overflow:hidden;margin-bottom:20px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,#0A1628 0%,#132F6B 30%,#1A4A9A 50%,#132F6B 70%,#0A1628 100%)}
.video-frame-wrap::before{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(90deg,#0A1628 0%,transparent 25%,transparent 75%,#0A1628 100%);z-index:2;pointer-events:none}
.video-frame{position:relative;padding-bottom:56.25%;z-index:1}
.video-frame iframe{position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%;border:0}

/* ── ACADEMY ── */
#academy{min-height:100vh;background:#FAF7F0;padding:30px 20px}
.acad-wrap{max-width:980px;margin:0 auto}
.navy-card{background:#0A1628;border-radius:18px;border:1px solid #2A5FAD;padding:24px 28px;margin-bottom:28px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:16px}
.acad-header-title{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;color:#fff;font-size:22px;margin:0}
.acad-header-sub{color:#FDF0C0;font-size:13px;margin:4px 0 0;opacity:.75}
.progress-info{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:8px}
.progress-pct{color:#D4A843;font-size:20px;font-weight:800;font-family:'Playfair Display',serif}
.progress-bar-sm{width:180px;background:#F0EBE0;border-radius:99px;height:7px;overflow:hidden}
.progress-fill-sm{height:100%;background:linear-gradient(90deg,#A07820,#F0CC5A);transition:width .5s}
.edit-btn{background:transparent;color:#FDF0C0;border:1.5px solid rgba(201,168,76,.4);border-radius:10px;padding:6px 14px;font-size:12px;cursor:pointer;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif}
.edit-btn.active{color:#D4A843}
.modules-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(250px,1fr));gap:16px}
.module-card{background:#fff;border:1.5px solid #F0EBE0;border-radius:16px;overflow:hidden;transition:all .2s;box-shadow:0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.06);cursor:pointer}
.module-card:hover{box-shadow:0 6px 24px rgba(201,168,76,.18)}
.module-card.locked{opacity:.5;cursor:not-allowed}
.module-card.done{border-color:#27AE6066}
.module-thumb{position:relative;width:100%;padding-bottom:52%;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0A1628,#0F2547)}
.module-thumb img{position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover}
.thumb-placeholder{position:absolute;inset:0;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center}
.play-icon{width:52px;height:52px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(212,168,67,.2);border:1px solid rgba(212,168,67,.4);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin-bottom:10px}
.play-arrow{width:0;height:0;border-top:10px solid transparent;border-bottom:10px solid transparent;border-left:18px solid #D4A843;margin-left:3px}
.lock-icon{font-size:28px;margin-bottom:8px}
.module-body{padding:14px 16px}
.module-num{color:#D4A843;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:2px;margin-bottom:4px}
.module-title{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;color:#0A1628;font-size:15px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:4px;line-height:1.3}
.module-desc{color:#7A8FA6;font-size:12px;line-height:1.5}
.done-badge{display:inline-block;background:#27AE6018;color:#27AE60;border:1px solid #27AE6044;border-radius:99px;padding:3px 12px;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;margin-top:8px}
.edit-fields{background:#FAF7F0;border-top:1px solid #F0EBE0;padding:12px 16px}
.edit-input{width:100%;background:#fff;border:1.5px solid #F0EBE0;border-radius:8px;padding:8px 10px;color:#1A1A2E;font-size:12px;outline:none;box-sizing:border-box;margin-bottom:6px;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif}
.save-btn{background:#0A1628;color:#fff;border:none;border-radius:8px;padding:8px 16px;font-size:12px;cursor:pointer;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-weight:700}

/* ── MEDALLAS Y GAMIFICACIÓN ── */
.medal-badge{display:inline-flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:2px;cursor:default}
.medal-svg{transition:all .3s}
.medal-svg.locked{opacity:.2;filter:grayscale(1)}
.medal-svg.earned{filter:drop-shadow(0 2px 6px rgba(212,168,67,.6))}
.score-bar{background:#F0EBE0;border-radius:99px;height:7px;overflow:hidden;margin:6px 0}
.score-fill{height:100%;background:linear-gradient(90deg,#D4A843,#F0CC5A);transition:width .8s ease;border-radius:99px}

/* ── MODAL PREGUNTAS ── */
.modal-overlay{position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,.7);z-index:1000;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:20px}
.modal-box{background:#fff;border-radius:20px;max-width:500px;width:100%;padding:28px 24px;max-height:90vh;overflow-y:auto}
.modal-title{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;color:#0A1628;font-size:20px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:6px}
.modal-sub{color:#7A8FA6;font-size:13px;margin-bottom:20px}
.q-label{color:#0A1628;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:6px;display:block}
.q-input{width:100%;border:1.5px solid #F0EBE0;border-radius:10px;padding:10px 12px;font-size:13px;color:#1A1A2E;outline:none;box-sizing:border-box;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;resize:vertical;min-height:70px}
.q-input:focus{border-color:#D4A843}
.rating-stars{display:flex;gap:8px;margin-bottom:16px}
.star-btn{font-size:28px;cursor:pointer;opacity:.3;transition:opacity .15s;background:none;border:none;padding:0}
.star-btn.active{opacity:1}
.modal-submit{width:100%;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#A07820,#D4A843);color:#0A1628;border:none;border-radius:10px;padding:14px;font-size:15px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;margin-top:8px}



/* ── SUBMÓDULOS ── */
.submod-section{margin-top:24px}
.submod-title{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;color:#0A1628;font-size:16px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:14px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px}
.submod-title::before{content:'';display:inline-block;width:3px;height:20px;background:#D4A843;border-radius:2px}
.submod-card{background:#fff;border:1.5px solid #F0EBE0;border-radius:12px;padding:14px 16px;margin-bottom:10px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s}
.submod-card:hover{border-color:#D4A843;box-shadow:0 4px 16px rgba(201,168,76,.15)}
.submod-num{width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:50%;background:#0A1628;color:#D4A843;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0}
.submod-info{flex:1}
.submod-name{color:#0A1628;font-size:14px;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:2px}
.submod-desc{color:#7A8FA6;font-size:12px}
.submod-action{color:#D4A843;font-size:18px}
.submod-url-input{width:100%;background:#FAF7F0;border:1.5px solid #F0EBE0;border-radius:8px;padding:7px 10px;color:#1A1A2E;font-size:12px;outline:none;box-sizing:border-box;margin-top:6px;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif}
.submod-save{background:#D4A843;color:#0A1628;border:none;border-radius:6px;padding:5px 12px;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;margin-top:4px;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif}
.add-submod-btn{width:100%;background:transparent;border:1.5px dashed #D4A843;border-radius:12px;padding:12px;color:#D4A843;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;margin-top:8px;transition:all .15s}
.add-submod-btn:hover{background:#FDF0C020}
.submod-card.soon-card{opacity:.5;cursor:default!important}

/* ── MODULE DETAIL ── */
#moddetail{min-height:100vh;padding:30px 20px;background:#FAF7F0}
.mod-wrap{max-width:680px;margin:0 auto}
.back-btn{background:transparent;border:1.5px solid #F0EBE0;border-radius:10px;padding:8px 14px;font-size:13px;cursor:pointer;margin-bottom:20px;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;color:#4A5568}
.mod-video{position:relative;padding-bottom:56.25%;background:linear-gradient(90deg,#0A1628 0%,#132F6B 30%,#1A4A9A 50%,#132F6B 70%,#0A1628 100%);border-radius:18px 18px 0 0;overflow:hidden}
.mod-video::before{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(90deg,#0A1628 0%,transparent 22%,transparent 78%,#0A1628 100%);z-index:2;pointer-events:none}
.mod-video img.main-thumb{position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:contain;z-index:1}
.mod-video img:not(.main-thumb){display:none}
.mod-video iframe{position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%;border:0;z-index:1}
.mod-video img{position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover}
.mod-video iframe{position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%;border:0}
.mod-play-overlay{position:absolute;inset:0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;text-decoration:none}
.mod-play-btn{width:54px;height:54px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(0,0,0,.55);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center}
.mod-play-arrow{width:0;height:0;border-top:10px solid transparent;border-bottom:10px solid transparent;border-left:18px solid #fff;margin-left:3px}
.mod-content{background:#fff;border-radius:0 0 18px 18px;border:1px solid #F0EBE0;padding:18px 20px;margin-bottom:16px}
.complete-btn{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#A07820,#D4A843);color:#0A1628;border:none;border-radius:10px;padding:12px 24px;font-size:14px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif}
.view-btn{background:#E74C3C;color:#fff;border:none;border-radius:10px;padding:12px 24px;font-size:14px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;margin-right:10px;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;text-decoration:none;display:inline-block}
</style>
</head>
<body>


<!-- ══ DATA ══ -->
<script>
const DIANA_PHOTO = "data:image/png;base64,";
const AP_LOGO = "data:image/png;base64,";
const APPS_SCRIPT = "https://script.google.com/macros/s/AKfycbzAv6qsXpl2DowM9UxOYZJK3UIEjaPWARetSc-Z7epexzohogaegVQ0hch3NGeRTR49/exec";
const TEAM_CODE = "TOPRODUCER";
const PARTNER_CODE = "fflamerica-zh3V";
const VIDEO_URL = "https://drive.google.com/file/d/1UZujjM2_up3IVBYb9-mBv1Tr133UfmaP/preview";
const CALENDLY_LINK = "https://calendly.com/diana-ariza";

const MODULES = [
  {id:1,  title:"Mentalidad de Top Producer",          desc:"El mindset que separa a los Top Producers del resto",              thumb:"data:image/jpeg;base64,", videoUrl:null},
  {id:2,  title:"La Disciplina Que Te Lleva al Top",   desc:"Tu horario de trabajo es tu compromiso con el éxito",              thumb:"data:image/jpeg;base64,", videoUrl:null},
  {id:3,  title:"Tu Primer Paso Hacia el Éxito",       desc:"Onboarding y todo lo que necesitas para arrancar",                 thumb:"data:image/jpeg;base64,", videoUrl:null},
  {id:4,  title:"Las Palabras Que Cierran Negocios",   desc:"Domina el guión IUL que convierte conversaciones en ventas",      thumb:"data:image/jpeg;base64,", videoUrl:null},
  {id:5,  title:"Conoce a Tu Cliente Ideal",           desc:"Entiende la elegibilidad y enfoca tu energía donde hay resultados",thumb:"data:image/jpeg;base64,
